name: @interego/mcp-relay
description: Cloud-hosted MCP relay — HTTP/SSE bridge for remote AI agents to access Interego tools

scripts.test: tsx tests/dpop.test.ts && tsx tests/federation-persistence.test.ts && tsx tests/oauth-token-persistence.test.ts && tsx tests/pgsl-shim-kernel-fusion.test.ts && tsx tests/relay-compliance-sign.test.ts && tsx tests/publish-defer.test.ts && tsx tests/interrogative-route.test.ts && npm run test:amep
scripts.test:amep: tsx _amep-seed-test.ts && tsx _amep-post-test.ts && tsx _amep-multihead-test.ts && tsx _amep-allacts-test.ts && tsx _amep-session-bridge-test.ts && tsx _amep-oauth-bridge-integration-test.ts && tsx _amep-hmd-binding-test.ts
